rulings.Case Title: ERWIN GONZALEZ VS. AURORA LOAN SERVICE, LL, A DELAWARE LIMITED et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 6, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs AURORA LOAN SERVICE LLC and MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend as to first and second causes of action, to allege tender or exception from tender rule; Sustian without leave to amend as to third cause of action, see Delino v. Platinum; Sustain with leave to amend as to fourth and fifth causes of action, to allege requiste specificity; Overrule sixth cause of action - Statute of Limitations sufficiently tolled, see Hobart v. Hobart Estate. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: C B PATEL VS. CRAIG WILLIAMS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Seal Records And Register Of Actions; Memo P/A; Declarations
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 6, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT CRAIG WILLIAMS' Motion To Seal Records And Register Of Actions. Hearing required. Should present written evidence confirming tenancy at 20 12th Street. Also would help if THC showed when they managed/owned property. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. MANUELA ALVAREZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Attendance At Deposition And Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memo P/A
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 6, 2012, line 3. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion to Compel Attendance At Deposition And Award Of Monetary Sanctions. Grant motion to compel and $40 costs. Deny attorney fees fails to detail how arrived at. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN TOM et al VS. SHERRY VINSON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 6, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANTs SHERRY VINSON and QIANYA MARTIN's DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)
